notes: High-risk HPV (16/18/…); E6/E7 are constitutively expressed after integration and are validated TIL/TCR/vaccine targets (E6 degrades p53; E7 inactivates RB)
Latent episome; targetable antigens depend on the latency program — latency II (LMP1/LMP2A/EBNA1) in NPC and EBV+ HL; latency I (EBNA1) in BL. EBV-specific CTLs give durable responses
Clonal HBV integration in HCC retains/expresses HBx and HBsAg (preS/S); HBx is the principal oncogenic transactivator
Clonally integrated Merkel-cell polyomavirus with a truncated large T (LT) plus small T (sT); both T antigens are constitutively expressed in virus-positive Merkel cell carcinoma
KSHV/HHV8 latent episome tethered to host chromatin by LANA (ORF73); LANA is expressed in essentially all KS spindle cells
Clonal proviral integration in adult T-cell leukaemia/lymphoma (ATLL); Tax drives early transformation, HBZ is constitutively expressed and maintains it. ATLL is not yet a registry cancer code.
